title: SSO login redirects back to the login page after successful auth
problem_reported: Several customers on the Okta SSO integration say that after entering their credentials at Okta and being redirected back to our app, they land on the login page again instead of the dashboard. It is intermittent - sometimes it works on the second try.
expected_behavior: After Okta redirects back to /auth/callback with a valid code, the app exchanges the code for a session, sets the session cookie, and redirects to /dashboard.
actual_behavior: The /auth/callback handler runs, but the subsequent request to /dashboard is unauthenticated and bounces back to /login.
diagnosis_steps: Reproduced in a private browser window with a test Okta account - confirmed the loop.
Inspected Set-Cookie on the /auth/callback response: session cookie present with SameSite=Lax, Secure, Domain=app.example.com.
Inspected the /dashboard request: session cookie missing in the Cookie header.
Noticed the callback response was served from https://auth.example.com while /dashboard is on https://app.example.com - different subdomains.
Checked cookie Domain attribute: set to 'app.example.com' exactly, not '.example.com', so it did not apply to the auth subdomain and was never sent on the cross-subdomain redirect chain.
resolution: Changed the session cookie Domain attribute from 'app.example.com' to '.example.com' so it is sent on any *.example.com request, including the auth subdomain during the redirect chain.
confirmation: Logged in via Okta in three browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari) and confirmed a single redirect to /dashboard with the session cookie present. Verified existing non-SSO password logins still work. Checked logs for 24h - no new CallbackUnauthenticated errors.
